title: Understanding Dataframes
body:
Jake looks for other sources of information about IM basketball. He finds a DataFrame, called basketball, that contains information on all UC Berkeley IM Basketball teams that have registered from $$2020$$ to the present. Here are the columns of basketball:
• Team: the name of the team. Teams can only play during one semester. Team names are unique across semesters. $$(type=String)$$
• Players: the number of players in the team $$(type=int)$$ • Total Points: the total points scored by the team $$(type=int)$$
• Team Description: A description of the team. $$(type=String)$$
The first five rows of basketball are shown below:
